name: RandomUser - User Profile Generation
description: Generate detailed random user profiles with demographics and location data

config.sql:
SELECT 
  count,
  gender,
  nationality,
  'https://randomuser.me/api/?results=' || count || '&gender=' || gender || '&nat=' || nationality as api_url,
  'inc=location,registered,dob,phone,picture' as include_fields,
  'password,username' as additional_fields,
  'format=json' as response_format
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY count, gender

SELECT 
  count,
  gender,
  nationality,
  api_url,
  include_fields,
  additional_fields,
  response_format,
  'https://randomuser.me/documentation#results' as api_documentation
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY count, gender
